diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,164 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createFactory, createMiddleware, Factory, CreateHandlersInterface, init, createApp
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../types, MiddlewareHandler, H, HandlerResponse, Input, Env, StatusCode
+- Neighbor files: src/helper
+- Safe summary: Factory helper for creating handlers and middleware with typed environments and input handling.
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../request/constants, ../../types, ../../utils/url, GET_MATCH_RESULT, RouterRoute, splitRoutingPath, getPattern
+- Neighbor files: src/helper
+- Safe summary: Helper to get matched routes and path information from the request context.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: UpgradeWebSocket, defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, WSContextInit, WSMessageReceive, createWSMessageEvent
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../types, MiddlewareHandler, TypedResponse, StatusCode, Event, MessageEvent, CloseEvent
+- Neighbor files: src/helper
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper for upgrading HTTP connections to WebSocket with event handlers.
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie, parse, parseSigned, serialize, serializeSigned
+- Neighbor files: src/helper
+- Safe summary: Cookie management helpers for getting, setting, and deleting cookies with signed or prefixed options.
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient, hc
+- Reads as: ../../client, ../../context, ../../hono, Client, ClientRequestOptions, ExecutionContext, Schema, UnionToIntersection
+- Neighbor files: src/helper
+- Safe summary: Testing helper for creating test clients from Hono apps with custom fetch implementations.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals, Runtime, getRuntime, edge-light, fastly, deno, node, bun
+- Reads as: ../../context, globalThis, navigator, Deno.env
+- Neighbor files: src/helper
+- Safe summary: Runtime detection helper for getting environment variables and runtime information.
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext, DefaultContextType, rawCssString
+- Reads as: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx/constants, ../../jsx/dom/css, HtmlEscapedCallback, HtmlEscapedString, raw, PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon
+- Neighbor files: src/helper
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper for runtime CSS generation with class name hashing and support for pseudo classes.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, minify, toHash, normalizeLabel, validateKeyframeName
+- Reads as: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, IS_CSS_ESCAPED, CssClassName, CssEscapedString, CLASS_NAME, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, SELECTOR, STYLE_STRING, SELECTORS, EXTERNAL_CLASS_NAMES
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css
+- Safe summary: Common CSS utilities providing class name generation, CSS string building, and minification.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: ../../http-exception, ../../utils/headers, HTTPException, RequestHeader, Request, Headers, fetch
+- Neighbor files: src/helper
+- Safe summary: Request forwarder helper for proxing requests with controlled header propagation.
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName, RouteData, handlerName
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../types, Env, RouterRoute, Router, findTargetHandler, isMiddleware, getColorEnabled, console.log
+- Neighbor files: src/helper
+- Safe summary: Developer tools for inspecting application routes and middleware definitions.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: ../../utils/html, escapeToBuffer, raw, resolveCallbackSync, HtmlEscaped, HtmlEscapedString, StringBufferWithCallbacks, stringBufferToString
+- Neighbor files: src/helper
+- Safe summary: HTML escaping and string generation helper for template literals.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssg, redirectPlugin, defaultPlugin, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG
+- Reads as: ./ssg, ./middleware, plugins
+- Neighbor files: src/helper
+- Safe summary: Static Site Generation helper for pre-rendering routes and generating static files.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, toSSG, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface, ToSSGResult, FileSystemModule, generateFilePath, defaultPlugin, determineExtension, combineBeforeRequestHooks, combineAfterResponseHooks, combineAfterGenerateHooks, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, SSGParams, SSG_CONTEXT, joinPaths, ensureWithinOutDir, createPool, replaceUrlParam
+- Reads as: ./middleware, ./plugins, ./utils, ../../client/utils, ../../hono, ../../types, utils/cookie, getExtension, utils/concurrent, createPool, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg, src/helper/ssg/utils
+- Safe summary: Core SSG implementation for fetching routes, processing responses, and saving content to filesystem.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: joinPaths, dirname, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: ../../hono, ../../router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, ../../types, RouterRoute, findTargetHandler, isMiddleware
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg
+- Safe summary: Utility functions for path manipulation and GSG route filtering.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSGContext, SSGParams, AddedSSGDataRequest, SSG_DISABLED_RESPONSE, isDynamicRoute
+- Reads as: ./utils, isDynamicRoute
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg, src/helper/ssg/
+- Safe summary: Middleware for controlling SSG behavior with route parameters and SSG context detection.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamSSE, streamText
+- Reads as: ./stream, ./sse, ./text, SSEMessage, SSEStreamingApi, StreamingApi
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming
+- Safe summary: Streaming response helpers for SSE and streaming text responses.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi is imported
+- Reads as: ./utils, isOldBunVersion, ../../context, ../../utils/stream, TransformStream
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming
+- Safe summary: General streaming response helper supporting chunked encoding with context retention.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
+- Reads as: ./utils, isOldBunVersion, ../../context, ../../utils/html, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, resolveCallback, ./stream, StreamingApi, TransformStream
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming
+- Safe summary: Server-Sent Events streaming helper with event, id, retry support.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamText, stream
+- Reads as: ./, ../../context, TEXT_PLAIN, StreamingApi, Transfer-Encoding, X-Content-Type-Options
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming
+- Safe summary: Streaming text response helper with plain text content type.
+
+## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts
+- Reads as: ./accepts, ../../utils/accept, acceptHeader, AcceptHeader
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts
+- Safe summary: HTTP Accept header parser for content negotiation.
+
+## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts, defaultMatch
+- Reads as: ../../utils/accept, parseAccept, ../../context, AcceptHeader, Accept, RequestHeader
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts
+- Safe summary: Content-negotiation helper matching Accept headers with supported types.
+
+## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: GetConnInfo, ConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType
+- Reads as: ./types, ../../context, GetConnInfo, ConnInfo
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo
+- Safe summary: Connection information extraction helper for network address and type details.
+
+## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
+- Main exports or names: GetConnInfo, ConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType
+- Reads as: ../../context, AddressType, NetAddrInfo
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo
+- Safe summary: Connection info type definitions for remote address and network protocol details.
+
+## Simple Index
+- [ ] src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/route/index.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/css/index.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/css/common.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/html/index.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
+- [ ] src/helper/conninfo/types.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

I need to:
1. Create bench-artifacts directory if it doesn't exist
2. Read all the listed files from the repository
3. Create a new file with the specified format containing information about each file
4. Include the file path and verification status in the final answer

Let me start by creating the directory and reading the files.
